ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., approved, rejected, disbursed) */,
  "loan_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was approved */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was disbursed */,
  "repayment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the first repayment is due */,
  "repayment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of repayments (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  "repayment_amount" REAL /* Amount of each repayment */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of the loan (e.g., personal, home, business) */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer handling the application */,
  "loan_status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current loan status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("loan_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "married" TEXT /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the applicant */,
  "self_employed" TEXT /* Whether the applicant is self-employed */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the applicant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the applicant */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the applicant */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the applicant */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, business, partnership) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the applicant */,
  "employment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of employment in years */,
  "previous_loans" INTEGER /* Number of previous loans taken by the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "applicant_income" REAL /* Applicant's income */,
  "coapplicant_income" REAL /* Coapplicant's income */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of income (e.g., salary, business, rental) */,
  "income_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of income (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "income_verification" TEXT /* Method of income verification (e.g., payslip, bank statement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incomes_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "credit_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "credit_history" TEXT /* Credit history of the applicant */,
  "credit_score_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit score was fetched */,
  "credit_score_source" TEXT /* Source of the credit score (e.g., Experian, Equifax) */,
  "credit_score_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the credit score (e.g., good payment history, late payments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_products" (
  "loan_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan product */,
  "loan_product_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the loan product */,
  "minimum_loan_amount" REAL /* Minimum loan amount for the product */,
  "maximum_loan_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount for the product */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the loan product */,
  "loan_term_range" TEXT /* Range of loan terms (e.g., 1-30 years) */,
  "application_fee" REAL /* Application fee for the loan product */,
  "processing_fee" REAL /* Processing fee for the loan product */,
  "late_payment_fee" REAL /* Late payment fee for the loan product */,
  "default_interest_rate" REAL /* Default interest rate for the loan product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_product_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "loan_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of rule (e.g., credit, income, age) */,
  "rule_value" TEXT /* Value of the rule (e.g., 50000 for income) */,
  "rule_operator" TEXT /* Operator for the rule (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_product_rules_loan_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("loan_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_areas" (
  "property_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property area record */,
  "loan_id" TEXT /* ID of the loan */,
  "property_area" TEXT /* Property area of the loan */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "property_city" TEXT /* City of the property */,
  "property_state" TEXT /* State of the property */,
  "property_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_areas_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_disbursements" (
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disbursement record */,
  "loan_id" TEXT /* ID of the loan */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date of disbursement */,
  "disbursement_amount" REAL /* Amount disbursed */,
  "disbursement_method" TEXT /* Method of disbursement (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  "disbursement_status" TEXT /* Status of the disbursement (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "disbursement_account" TEXT /* Account number for disbursement */,
  "disbursement_bank" TEXT /* Bank name for disbursement */,
  "disbursement_amount_remaining" REAL /* Remaining amount to be disbursed */,
  "disbursement_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes for the disbursement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_disbursements_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
